summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ManoProtect CRO components and blog article integration. All 9 features tested passed successfully. Strategic blog articles are properly routed, the Guías y Comparativas section is visible on /blog with correct links, SEM landing pages are accessible, and Sentinel X page includes all CRO components (Testimonials, ProductComparison, StickyCTA).
passed_tests: TEST 1: Blog article /blog/mejores-relojes-sos-2026 renders correctly with title, rankings (#1 ManoProtect Sentinel X), and CTA
TEST 2: Blog article /blog/como-funciona-reloj-sos renders correctly with step-by-step guide (4 steps: Activación, Localización, Envío alertas, Comunicación)
TEST 3: Blog article /blog/reloj-gps-alzheimer renders correctly with Alzheimer-specific content (800.000+ stats, zonas seguras)
TEST 4: Blog article /blog/reloj-gps-sin-cuotas renders correctly with cost comparison content (Mitos vs Realidad)
TEST 5: Blog main page /blog shows 'Guías y Comparativas' section with all 4 strategic article links
TEST 7a: Sentinel X page includes Testimonials section ('Lo Que Dicen Nuestros Clientes' with María García, Antonio Martínez, etc.)
TEST 7b: Sentinel X page includes ProductComparison table ('Sentinel X vs La Competencia' with Comparativa 2026 badge)
TEST 7c: Sentinel X page includes StickyCTA bar (appears on scroll with 'Reservar Ahora' button)
TEST 8: Blog guide links navigate correctly from /blog to respective article pages
TEST 9: 'Ver más artículos' button on individual blog articles navigates back to /blog
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRO integration work completed successfully. Blog articles (MejoresRelojesSOS2026, ComoFuncionaRelojSOS, RelojParaAlzheimer, RelojGPSSinCuotas) are properly routed and render with correct content. SEM landing pages (/reloj-sos-ancianos, /reloj-gps-mayores, /boton-sos-senior) are accessible. Sentinel X page includes all 3 CRO components (Testimonials, ProductComparison, StickyCTA). Navigation flows work correctly.
